title: Contact Details Element
excerpt: Use the Contact Details Element to integrate Link. [Link](https://stripe.com/payments/link) saves and autofills customer payment and shipping information. Customers can use different funding sources to pay with Link, including credit cards, debit cards, and US bank accounts. Learn more at [link.com](https://www.link.com). Use the [Contact Details Element](https://docs.stripe.com/js/element/contact_details_element) (previously known as the Link Authentication Element) to create a single email input field for both email collection and Link authentication.…
